description: Worst threat to a clean attach, ever — Honedge TUP-107 has not been trivia-passed, so I had to do the tsukumogami citation work myself. Sigh. Vision-pass tagged tsukumogami + yokai in tags_hub; printed flavor depicts canonical haunted-sword behavior (the blue cloth drains the wielder's life energy); Bulbapedia per-species design-source documents Honedge as one of the franchise's clearest tsukumogami citations, the sword-yokai branch. Wave 94's Doublade attach used the same evidence tier (Bulbapedia design-canon, no trivia-explicit citation) and the node's own Caveats explicitly staged Honedge as a near-term attach candidate. Stack-attach, not a 1:1. Blueballed-by-fanout but the cohort was the right home.
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: sm9-107 — Honedge Team Up print metadata]
[cohort node: cards/_characters/tsukumogami-pokemon.md — precedent for vision-pass-plus-design-canon attach, see Doublade SM11-94]

edges_added.mechanism: card.characters[] pointer + cohort.appears_on[] entry + Appears-on wikilink + species bullet in cohort body

next_pass_suggestions.rationale: TUP-107 is now graph-attached but trivia-pending; once trivia lands, the species-line continuity narrative (sword progressively possessed: Honedge -> Doublade -> Aegislash) can be enriched in the cohort body in line with Doublade SM11-94's existing trivia-citation.

WAR-14 Gideon's Sacrifice trivia named Gideon + Liliana as the canonical story-pivot pair. Anchor count is currently 1 in corpus from a single-card trivia pass; below the 3-anchor threshold. Wait for further Gideon/Liliana-bearing prints to clear the threshold OR a War of the Spark cohort node could absorb both characters as members.

Same blocker as Gideon — single-anchor situation. Liliana is a heavy-storyline planeswalker who would clear threshold quickly if 2-3 more printings surface in corpus; flag for the next time a Liliana-tagged card lands in the queue.

Second corpus Honedge print currently unenriched; once vision-passed it attaches to tsukumogami-pokemon via the same path the TUP-107 attach used. Same species, same design-canon citation, additive print-count.

potion_rule_check: Citation tier matches existing cohort precedent (Doublade SM11-94 was attached with the same Bulbapedia design-canon + per-species flavor evidence, no BBL-squint extrapolation). The cohort thesis stays at the canonical-event scope: Bulbapedia per-species design-source sections explicitly cite tsukumogami as the species design source. No labor/rebellion/stewardship overlay touched.
